prompt.content:
Aggregate and analyse the supplement file attached and the customer ancillary spend file for customers > 40 years of age and with a salary > $100k, and report the ratio of the highest absolute z-score to the second-highest z-score for each variable (extended_returns, extended_warranty, and insurance_protection). Also, state the percentile of Texas's Z-score for each variable.
Provide all the answers as a console message, rounded to 4 decimal places.
